## Purpose
This file serves as an example configuration for the DiffDoc tool, outlining the settings and parameters necessary for its operation.

## User-Visible Behavior
Users would observe the structure of a configuration file that specifies various endpoints, models, and settings for local and cloud-based AI processing.

## Business Rules
The configuration includes rules for specifying local and cloud AI providers, model types, and batch sizes for embedding operations. It also allows for the inclusion and exclusion of specific file patterns.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
The file accepts configuration parameters such as schema URL, base directory, repository path, AI provider settings, and model specifications. It outputs a structured configuration that the DiffDoc tool can utilize.

## Side Effects
None identified.

## Error And Edge Cases
The configuration does not handle errors directly; however, missing or incorrect values (like an empty API key) may lead to failures in connecting to the specified AI services.

## Dependencies
None identified.

## Operational Notes
The configuration is designed to be flexible, allowing users to specify local or cloud AI endpoints and models. Users should ensure that the specified endpoints are accessible and that the API key is provided for cloud services.
